RURIMEGU-COLLECT.title: Collect
RURIMEGU-COLLECT.description: Deal damage to a random enemy equal to the number of ❤️ you have, then lose all ❤️.
RURIMEGU-BACKSTAGE.title: Backstage
RURIMEGU-BACKSTAGE.description: Triggers while this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], whenever the stated condition is met.
